chapter_title.en: Chapter 72 – The day of Al-Fitr (1<sup>st</sup> Shawwal)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/409)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/409)
text: إِذَا كَانَ صَبِيحَةُ يَوْمِ الْفِطْرِ نَادَى مُنَادٍ اغْدُوا إِلَى جَوَائِزِكُمْ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from one of our companions, from Jameel,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Whenever it is the morning of Al-Fitr, a Caller calls out: ‘Go to your awards!’.
en.sarwar: 4. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from certain individuals of our people from Jamil ibn Salih who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that when it is the morning of the day of al-Fitr, an announcer announces, ‘Come to receive your presents.’”
